1.name: Blue-eyes White Dragon
1.description: An extremely rare card with unsurpassed attack and defense power.

2.name: Mystical Elf
2.description: A delicate elf that lacks in offense but has a terrific defense backed by mystical power.

3.name: Hitotsu-me Giant
3.description: A one-eyed behemoth with thick, powerful arms made for delivering punishing blows.

4.name: Baby Dragon
4.description: Much more than just a child, this dragon is gifted with untapped power.

5.name: Ryu-kishin
5.description: A very elusive creature that looks like a harmless statue until it attacks.

6.name: Feral Imp
6.description: A playful little imp that lurks in the dark, waiting to attack an unwary enemy.

7.name: Winged Dragon #1
7.description: A dragon commonly found guarding mountain fortresses. Its signature attack is a sweeping dive from out of the blue.

8.name: Mushroom Man
8.description: Found in moist areas, this monster launches poison spores against its enemies.

9.name: Shadow Specter
9.description: Ghostly beast that appears in the wasteland and is particularly troublesome when faced in large numbers.

10.name: Blackland Fire Dragon
10.description: A dragon that dwells in the depths of darkness. Its defensive capability suffers from its poor eyesight.

11.name: Sword Arm of Dragon
11.description: With a body covered in sword-like thorns, nothing dares stand in the way of this monster when it charges.

12.name: Swamp Battleguard
12.description: This creature is armed with a spiked club that can destroy almost anything in its path. Rumored to have a brother that is just as destructive.

13.name: Tyhone
13.description: Capable of firing cannonballs from its mouth for long-range attacks against enemies.

14.name: Battle Steer
14.description: A bull monster often found in the woods. Charges enemy monsters with a pair of razor-sharp horns.

15.name: Flame Swordsman
15.description: A fighter gifted with the power of fire. Attacks enemies with a sword that launches flames.

16.name: Time Wizard
16.description: A sorcerer capable of bending time to his will. Though not powerful at first glance, appearances can be deceiving.

17.name: Right Leg of the Forbidden One
17.description: A forbidden limb sealed by magic. Whoever breaks this seal will know infinite power. Only one card of this type may be included in a deck.

18.name: Left Leg of the Forbidden One
18.description: A forbidden limb sealed by magic. Whoever breaks this seal will know infinite power. Only one card of this type may be included in a deck.

19.name: Right Arm of the Forbidden One
19.description: A forbidden limb sealed by magic. Whoever breaks this seal will know infinite power. Only one card of this type may be included in a deck.

20.name: Left Arm of the Forbidden One
20.description: A forbidden limb sealed by magic. Whoever breaks this seal will know infinite power. Only one card of this type may be included in a deck.

21.name: Exodia the Forbidden
21.description: Once combined with arms and legs, this monster is freed from its magical chains. Only one card of this type may be included in a deck.

22.name: Summoned Skull
22.description: An entity with dark powers for confusing the enemy. Among the FIEND class of monsters, this is a pretty rare card.

23.name: The Wicked Worm Beast
23.description: A monster worm created by the powers of darkness. It suddenly appears from under the ground to attack its enemies.

24.name: Skull Servant
24.description: A skeletal ghost that isn't strong but can mean trouble in large numbers.

25.name: Horn Imp
25.description: A small imp that dwells in the dark. Its single horn makes it a formidable opponent.

26.name: Battle Ox
26.description: A monster with tremendous power. Destroys enemies with a swing of its axe.

27.name: Beaver Warrior
27.description: What this creature lacks in size, it makes up for in defense when battling in the meadow.

28.name: Rock Ogre Grotto #1
28.description: Protected by a solid body of rock, this creature throws a bone-shattering punch.

29.name: Mountain Warrior
29.description: A solid warrior that can move swiftly over rough terrain.

30.name: Zombie Warrior
30.description: A deceptively fragile-looking skeleton warrior that is known for its swift and precise attacks.

31.name: Koumori Dragon
31.description: A vicious, fire-breathing dragon whose wicked flames corrupt the souls of its victims.

32.name: Two-headed King Rex
32.description: An unusual and rarely seen two-headed dragon.

33.name: Judge Man
33.description: For this club-wielding warrior, there is no other outcome to battle than victory or defeat.

34.name: Saggi the Dark Clown
34.description: This clown appears out of nowhere and executes some very strange moves to avoid enemy attacks.

35.name: Dark Magician
35.description: The ultimate wizard in terms of attack and defense.

36.name: The Snake Hair
36.description: A monster with the head of a poisonus snake. One look will turn an unwary opponent to stone.

37.name: Gaia the Dragon Champion
37.description: A warrior's prowess combines with a dragon's speed to create a powerful offensive force.

38.name: Gaia the Fierce Knight
38.description: A knight mounted on a horse that travels faster than the wind. His battle charge is a force to be reckoned with.

39.name: Curse of Dragon
39.description: A wicked dragon that taps dark forces to execute a powerful attack.

40.name: Dragon Piper
40.description: A jar carved with strange patterns. It has a particularly high defense factor.

41.name: Celtic Guardian
41.description: An elf, who learned to wield a sword, baffles enemies with lightning-swift attacks.

42.name: Illusionist Faceless Mage
42.description: Manipulates enemy attacks with the power of illusion. A very rare card.

43.name: Karbonala Warrior
43.description: A very average-looking fighter with an unusually high attack factor.

44.name: Rogue Doll
44.description: A unique doll gifted with mystical power. Particularly powerful when attacking against dark forces.

46.name: Griffore
46.description: This creature's tough hide deflects just about any attack.

47.name: Torike
47.description: Not as tough as it looks in terms of defense. This monster's sharp horn gives it an edge when attacking.

48.name: Sangan
48.description: A compact, three-eyed monster that is dangerous when faced in the dark.

49.name: Big Insect
49.description: A giant ant that dwells in the jungle. Powerful in terms of both ATK and DEF factors.

50.name: Basic Insect
50.description: Usually found travelling in swarms, this creature's ideal environment is the forest.

51.name: Armored Lizard
51.description: A lizard with a very tough hide and a very vicious bite.

52.name: Hercules Beetle
52.description: A massive beetle with a tough hide and a dangerous horn.

53.name: Killer Needle
53.description: A huge bee with exceptional strength. Particularly dangerous when a swarm is encountered.

54.name: Gokibore
54.description: A large, spherical roach that attacks its enemies by rolling over them. Its tough defense makes it a formidable foe.

55.name: Giant Flea
55.description: A giant blood-sucking flea that's devastating when attacking.

56.name: Larvae Moth
56.description: Not much in its larval form, this creature is a force to be reckoned with when it grows to become a colossal moth.

57.name: Great Moth
57.description: A powerful creature of the forest, this huge moth attacks its enemies by spreading poison dust with its wings.

58.name: Kuriboh
58.description: By itself, this small creature may not seem like much. But in the dark, it attacks in numbers as a formidable force.

59.name: Mammoth Graveyard
59.description: A mammoth that protects the gravesite of its pack. It's absolutely merciless when facing graverobbers.

60.name: Great White
60.description: A giant white shark with razor-sharp teeth.

61.name: Wolf
61.description: A rarely seen wolf with a powerful nose for catching the scent of an enemy.

62.name: Harpie Lady
62.description: A human-shaped animal with wings. Beautiful to watch, but lethal when engaged in battle.

63.name: Harpie Lady Sisters
63.description: Three fierce sisters who relentlessly attack as a team.

64.name: Tiger Axe
64.description: A fast and powerful axe-wielding beast warrior.

65.name: Silver Fang
65.description: A snow wolf that's beautiful to the eye but absolutely vicious in battle.

66.name: Kojikocy
66.description: A man-hunter with powerful arms that can crush boulders.

67.name: Perfectly Ultimate Great Moth
67.description: The final incarnation of the ultimate insect, the Great Moth!

68.name: Garoozis
68.description: An axe-swinging beast warrior with the head of a dragon.

69.name: Thousand Dragon
69.description: A dragon that has grown and developed over a thousand years.

70.name: Fiend Kraken
70.description: A massive squid that suddenly appears from the depths of the sea to attack unwary enemies.

71.name: Jellyfish
71.description: An almost invisible, semi-transparent jellyfish that drifts in the sea.

72.name: Cocoon of Evolution
72.description: This creature is capable of instantly evolving larvae into adults.

73.name: Kairyu-shin
73.description: A sea dragon that's referred to as the "King of the Ocean". It attacks its enemies with huge tidal waves.

74.name: Giant Soldier of Stone
74.description: A giant warrior made of stone. A punch from this creature has earth-shaking results.

75.name: Man-eating Plant
75.description: A meat-eating plant that is attractive to the eye but dangerous when approached.

76.name: Krokodilus
76.description: A vicious crocodile with intelligence. Hard scales form a natural armor for this creature.

77.name: Grappler
77.description: A devious snake with a thick body that wraps around an enemy monster and squeezes the life out of it.

78.name: Axe Raider
78.description: An axe-wielding monster of tremendous strength and agility.

79.name: Megazowler
79.description: Nothing stands in the way of this spike-covered dinosaur.

80.name: Uraby
80.description: Fast on its feet, this dinosaur rips enemies to shreds with its sharp claws.

81.name: Crawling Dragon #2
81.description: A powerful dragon with teeth that can grind almost anything to dust.

82.name: Red-eyes B. Dragon
82.description: A very rare card with a high-level ATK factor.

83.name: Castle of Dark Illusions
83.description: A creature that can generate darkness to envelop all that exists around it.

84.name: Reaper of the Cards
84.description: This monster boasts a strong defense and a massive scythe that cuts through almost anything.

85.name: King of Yamimakai
85.description: Wields the power of darkness to destroy its enemies.

86.name: Barox
86.description: This creature flies through the dark, attacking its enemies with its long, hairy arms.

87.name: Dark Chimera
87.description: A fire-breathing monster that dwells in the netherworld.

88.name: Metal Guardian
88.description: A fiend guarding the treasures of the netherworld. Its defense is particularly high in a dark environment.

89.name: Catapult Turtle
89.description: Well-protected by its shell, this monster flings projectiles from its catapult.

90.name: Gyakutenno Megami
90.description: Uses her mystical power to protect the weak and provide spiritual support.

91.name: Mystic Horseman
91.description: Half man and half horse, this monster is known for its extreme speed.

92.name: Rabid Horseman
92.description: A powerful and unstoppable combination of bull and horse.

93.name: Zanki
93.description: Prefers to face enemies one-on-one. His swiftly drawn blade delivers a quick and immediate finnish.

94.name: Crawling Dragon
94.description: A weakened dragon that can no longer fly, but is still a formidable force to be reckoned with.

95.name: Crass Clown
95.description: A performer in the Dark Circus, this clown drains the strength of its enemies with strange dances.

96.name: Armored Zombie
96.description: A warrior raised from the beyond. Blindly swings a sharp blade with devastating force.

97.name: Dragon Zombie
97.description: A dragon revived by sorcery. Its breath is highly corrosive.

98.name: Clown Zombie
98.description: A clown revived by the powers of darkness. Its strange dance has sent many monsters to their ends.

99.name: Pumpking the King of Ghosts
99.description: This pumpkin king strikes at its enemies with its long tentacles.

100.name: Battle Warrior
100.description: A warrior that fights with his bare hands.

101.name: Wings of Wicked Flame
101.description: Soaring over its enemies on wings of crimson fire, this monster attacks by blasting flames from its body.

102.name: Mask of Darkness
102.description: A shadow mask created by the hands of a dark mage.

103.name: Job-change Mirror
103.description: An indestructible, wicked mirror that blocks enemy attacks.

104.name: Curtain of the Dark Ones
104.description: A curtain woven by the hands of a sorcerer. It is said to enhance the power of magic- users.

105.name: Tomozaurus
105.description: A deceivingly small creature that is so vicious it attacks both friend and foe without discretion.

106.name: Spirit of the Winds
106.description: A spirit of the wind that freely sails the skies. Known to generate storms when it's in a bad mood.

107.name: Kageningen
107.description: Uses both its physical and shadow forms to attack, making it a difficult creature to overcome.

108.name: Graveyard and the Hand of Invitation
108.description: A final resting place that enhances the power of the doomed and drains that of the living.

109.name: Goddess with the Third Eye
109.description: A goddess with an all-seeing eye that reveals all.

110.name: Hero of the East
110.description: A samurai from the Far East armed with a razor-sharp sword.

111.name: Doma The Angel of Silence
111.description: This angel rules over the doomed and administers it when necessary.

112.name: That Which Feeds on Life
112.description: A vile monster that fuels its power by draining the essence of life from its opponents.

113.name: Dark Gray
113.description: Entirely gray, this beast has rarely been seen by mortal eyes.

114.name: White Magical Hat
114.description: A gentleman thief that eludes the law despite the fact that he sticks out like a sore thumb with his silk hat and white cape.

115.name: Kamion Wizard
115.description: A magic-user that controls chaos and wields a mighty sickle.

116.name: Nightmare Scorpion
116.description: A very toxic creature that induces nightmares and attacks its victims with four poison- tipped stingers.

117.name: Spirit of the Books
117.description: A spirit of the books with infinite knowledge and an endless variety of attack strategies.

118.name: Supporter in the Shadows
118.description: A cute elf that assists against enemies while remaining hidden from sight.

119.name: Trial of Nightmares
119.description: Passes judgment on enemies that are locked in coffins.

120.name: Dream Clown
120.description: The mysterious dance of this creature draws its enemies into eternal slumber.

121.name: Sleeping Lion
121.description: Frequently found sleeping, this monster is very dangerous when awakened.

122.name: Yamatano Dragon Scroll
122.description: This dragon is conjured from a picture scroll to attack enemies. It has a pretty low defense factor.

123.name: Dark Plant
123.description: A vicious flower raised from polluted soil and fertilized by dark forces.

124.name: Ancient Tool
124.description: An engine of destruction discovered in the ruins of an ancient civilization.

125.name: Faith Bird
125.description: A bird with a very long tail that attacks with a light that emanates from its entire being.

126.name: Orion the Battle King
126.description: A mysterious creature known as the king of warriors, but nobody has lived long enough to tell how it earned its reputation.

127.name: Ansatsu
127.description: A silent and swift warrior specializing in sneak attack.

128.name: LaMoon
128.description: A sorcerer who lives on the moon and attacks opponents with the power of lunar light.

129.name: Nemuriko
129.description: A child-like creature that controls a sleep spirit to beckon enemies into eternal slumber.

130.name: Weather Control
130.description: This monster is capable of manipulating the weather. This power is the reason behind the changing climate of mountains.

131.name: Octoberser
131.description: A strange creature with the head of a fish and the tentacles of an octopus that attacks its enemies with spears.

132.name: The 13th Grave
132.description: A zombie that suddenly appeared from plot #13 - supposedly an empty grave.

133.name: Charubin the Fire Knight
133.description: A warrior protected by a shell that can even deflect the heat of burning flames.

134.name: Mystical Capture Chain
134.description: A mystical chain that is believed capable of binding its enemies and preventing their attacks.

135.name: Fiend's Hand
135.description: Long arms reach out from the Swamp of Chaos to drag in enemy creatures.

136.name: Witty Phantom
136.description: Dressed in a night-black tuxedo, this creature presides over the doomed.

137.name: Mystery Hand
137.description: Twisting the fabric of reality, arms stretch out from another dimension to attack opponents.

138.name: Dragon Statue
138.description: A granite warrior with a dragon's soul wields a powerful sword against all enemies.

139.name: Blue-eyed Silver Zombie
139.description: A creature rumored to turn enemies into zombies with a strange ray that emanates from its eyes.

140.name: Toad Master
140.description: Thousands of years old, this frog wizard attacks enemies with an army of tadpoles.

141.name: Spiked Snail
141.description: Evolving from the powers of darkness, this snail has arms and legs that allow swift attacks against its enemies.

142.name: Flame Manipulator
142.description: Attacks enemies with fire-related spells, such as the "Sea of Flames" and the "Wall of Fire".

143.name: Necrolancer the Timelord
143.description: The first in a line of golems that appears almost anywhere from within a dimensional ring.

144.name: Djinn the Watcher of the Wind
144.description: Controls the air currents to create violent winds and tornadoes to blow away its enemies.

145.name: The Bewitching Phantom Thief
145.description: A flashy, black-caped thief who wields a magic cane.

146.name: Temple of Skulls
146.description: A weird temple of skulls and bones that sucks the living essence of all those who dare approach it.

147.name: Monster Egg
147.description: A warrior hidden within an egg that attacks enemies by flinging eggshells.

148.name: The Shadow Who Controls the Dark
148.description: A living shadow that dwells in the realm of darkness. It paralyzes its enemies to prevent attacks.

149.name: Lord of the Lamp
149.description: A giant that appears from a mystic lamp and follows the orders of the lamp's owner.

150.name: Akihiron
150.description: A mysterious creature that dwells below the sea.

151.name: Rhaimundos of the Red Sword
151.description: A warrior armed with the Sword of Crimson Flames. Uses fire to bind the movement of its enemies.

152.name: The Melting Red Shadow
152.description: A creature that melts into the earth, melds with an opponent's shadow, and attacks from below.

153.name: Dokuroizo the Grim Reaper
153.description: A living spirit that preys on the living essence of enemies.

154.name: Fire Reaper
154.description: A creature that deals out punishment with its flaming arrows.

155.name: Larvas
155.description: A fast-moving, bird-like creature that strangles an opposing monster with its long, thin arms.

156.name: Hard Armor
156.description: A living suit of armor that attacks enemies with a bone-jarring tackle.

157.name: Firegrass
157.description: A fire-breathing plant found growing near volcanoes.

158.name: Man Eater
158.description: Man-eating plant with poison feelers for attacking enemies.

159.name: Dig Beak
159.description: Coiling its serpent-like body, this creature spins and attacks with its snapping beak.

160.name: M-warrior #1
160.description: Specializing in combination attacks, this warrior uses magnetism to block an enemy's escape.

161.name: M-warrior #2
161.description: Specializing in combination attacks, this warrior is equipped with a tough, magnetically coated armor.

162.name: Tainted Wisdom
162.description: A parasite brain that preys on the knowledge and intelligence of its opponents.

163.name: Lisark
163.description: An unusual creature with sapphire eyes that creates visions to confuse the enemy.

164.name: Lord of Zemia
164.description: A vile entity that deceives enemies into walking a path of destruction.

165.name: The Judgement Hand
165.description: The hand of final judgment is capable of intense attacks against the enemy.

166.name: Mysterious Puppeteer
166.description: A puppet master that manipulates enemies during battle.

167.name: Ancient Jar
167.description: A fragile jar from the past containing a mysterious creature.

168.name: Darkfire Dragon
168.description: Scorching flames that wipe out enemies in the blink of an eye.

169.name: Dark King of the Abyss
169.description: King of the netherworld. It's said that he once had the power to rule over the Dark.

170.name: Spirit of the Harp
170.description: A spirit that soothes the soul with the music of its glorious harp.

171.name: Big Eye
171.description: This creature is covered with hypnotic eyes for mesmerizing its enemies.

172.name: Armaill
172.description: A strange warrior who manipulates three fearsome blades with both hands and its tail.

173.name: Dark Prisoner
173.description: This creature manipulates light to eliminate all traces of its appearance.

174.name: Hurricail
174.description: A twister that runs rampant in the wastelands, cutting its enemies with blades of wind.

175.name: Ancient Brain
175.description: Exiled from reality, this creature is adept at fighting in the dark.

176.name: Fire Eye
176.description: A winged eye enveloped in flames that attacks enemies with fire.

177.name: Monsturtle
177.description: A vicious turtle with a spiked shell.

178.name: Claw Reacher
178.description: Stretching arms and razor-sharp claws make this monster a formidable opponent.

179.name: Phantom Dewan
179.description: A wizard that freezes an enemy's movement with a single curse.

180.name: Arlownay
180.description: A maiden in the flower blossoms spreads poisonous pollen against opponents.

181.name: Dark Shade
181.description: Emits a dazzling light from its crystal to blind its enemies.

182.name: Masked Clown
182.description: A dancing warrior that makes mincemeat out of opponents with a sharp scythe.

183.name: Lucky Trinket
183.description: A thin and reedy creature protected by sacred power.

184.name: Genin
184.description: Uses amazing sleight-of-hand to fool and destroy its enemies.

185.name: Eyearmor
185.description: This warrior confuses and destroys enemies by adopting their images.

186.name: Fiend Refrection #2
186.description: A bird-beast that summons reinforcements with a hand mirror.

187.name: Gate Deeg
187.description: A creature with an abdominal portal used for summoning monsters from the netherworld.

188.name: Synchar
188.description: An ugly creature with two heads and a mouth for blasting laser beams.

189.name: Fusionist
189.description: A monstrous cat with wings and a long, striking tail.

190.name: Akakieisu
190.description: A wizard whose incantations numb the senses of opposing monsters.

191.name: LaLa Li-oon
191.description: Protected by thunder, this dangerous cloud attacks its enemies with acid rain.

192.name: Key Mace
192.description: A small angel whose cuteness melts the hearts of its enemies.

193.name: Turtle Tiger
193.description: A tiger encased in a protective shell that attacks its enemies with its razor-sharp fangs.

194.name: Terra the Terrible
194.description: Know as a dweller of the swamps, this creature is a minion of the Dark forces.

195.name: Doron
195.description: An unpredictable creature that splits into two and attacks an enemy from opposite directions.

196.name: Arma Knight
196.description: An ammonite warrior that has protected the seas from the dawn of time.

197.name: Mech Mole Zombie
197.description: A creature of the night that attacks enemies with its rocket-powered arms.

198.name: Happy Lover
198.description: A little angel that fires beams of happiness from the heart jewel on its forehead.

199.name: Penguin Knight
199.description: A penguin-like creature that slides on its belly to deliver a blow with its outstretched sword.

200.name: Petit Dragon
200.description: A very small dragon known for its vicious attacks.

201.name: Frenzied Panda
201.description: A savage beast that carries a big bamboo stick for beating down its enemies.

202.name: Air Marmot of Nefariousness
202.description: A horned beaver with wings that throws high-velocity acorns from the sky with uncanny accuracy.

203.name: Phantom Ghost
203.description: Malicious spirits that walk the world of the living, unable to find their final resting place.

204.name: Mabarrel
204.description: A cannon-like monster that rapidly fires eyeballs at the enemy.

205.name: Dorover
205.description: An ugly, melting creature that breathes out poison gas.

206.name: Twin Long Rods #1
206.description: This creature swings its whip-like arms for mid-range attacks against enemies.

207.name: Droll Bird
207.description: With a battle cry that curdles the blood of its opponent, this creature attacks with its massive beak.

208.name: Petit Angel
208.description: A quick-moving and tiny angel that's very difficult to hit.

209.name: Winged Cleaver
209.description: This creature attacks by swinging around its sickle-like arms.

210.name: Hinotama Soul
210.description: An intensely hot flame creature that rams anything that stands in its way.

211.name: Kaminarikozou
211.description: This creature stores lightning within its body to deliver electrifying attacks.

212.name: Meotoko
212.description: A huge monster with a single eye that fires an intence beam.

213.name: Aqua Madoor
213.description: A wizard of the waters that conjures a liquid wall to crush any enemies that oppose him.

214.name: Kagemusha of the Blue Flame
214.description: Serves as a double for the ruler of the Blue Flame. A master swordsman that wields a fine blade.

215.name: Flame Ghost
215.description: A fiery spirit that burns anything in its path.

216.name: Dryad
216.description: A spirit of the forest protected by the surrounding plant life.

217.name: B. Skull Dragon
217.description: A very rare creature created from the fusion of an uncommon beast and a vicious dragon.

218.name: Two-mouth Darkruler
218.description: A dinosaur with two crushing jaws. Stores electricity in its horn and releases high voltage bolts from the mouth on its back.

219.name: Solitude
219.description: A beast-warrior that swings a massive scythe that draws on the spirit of its enemies to deliver devastating blows.

220.name: Masked Sorcerer
220.description: A mysterious wizard whose face remains forever hidden behind a strange mask.

221.name: Kumootoko
221.description: A massive, intelligent spider that traps its enemies with webbing.

222.name: Midnight Fiend
222.description: A winged creature rumored to appear at midnight.

223.name: Roaring Ocean Snake
223.description: A massive sea serpent that creates tidal waves to wipe out its enemies.

224.name: Trap Master
224.description: A warrior that excels in laying traps such as a bottomless pit, for eternally ensnaring opponents.

225.name: Fiend Sword
225.description: Few have escaped the curse of this creature. Those that have done so have gained untold power.

226.name: Skull Stalker
226.description: Swift and vicious, this monster grabs its victim with its pincers and attacks the captive with its poison stinger.

227.name: Hitodenchak
227.description: A vicious starfish that spits acid to melt away its enemies.

228.name: Wood Remains
228.description: A zombie that rose from the remains of the woodland ruler.

229.name: Hourglass of Life
229.description: A creature that allows power to be gained at the cost of life.

230.name: Rare Fish
230.description: An unusual and ferocious fish with the head of a beast.

231.name: Wood Clown
231.description: An unpleasantly smiling creature that wields a scythe to avoid enemy blows.

232.name: Madjinn Gunn
232.description: A living weapon that fires projectiles from its mouth.

233.name: Dark Titan of Terror
233.description: A spirit said to dwell in the world of dreams. Attacks enemies in their sleep.

234.name: Beautiful Headhuntress
234.description: A lovely swordmaster with some very agile moves.

235.name: Wodan the Resident of the Forest
235.description: A warrior that has long resided in the forest and enjoys the protection of Mother Nature.

236.name: Guardian of the Labyrinth
236.description: A warrior that guards the entrance to the netherworld.

237.name: Haniwa
237.description: An earthen doll that protects the treasure in the tombs of ancient kings.

238.name: Yashinoki
238.description: A palm tree with a will of its own that attacks enemies by flinging coconuts.

239.name: Vishwar Randi
239.description: A woman warrior that serves the forces of darkness.

240.name: The Drdek
240.description: An eyeball creature with legs for jumping high and delivering finishing blows with its sharp claws.

241.name: Dark Assailant
241.description: Armed with Psycho Sword, this sinister cutthroat rules the outer land.

242.name: Candle of Fate
242.description: An opponent's fate is decided when the flames of each finger are extinguished.

243.name: Water Element
243.description: A water spirit that envelops its opponent in a thick fog to cover its attack.

244.name: Dissolverock
244.description: A monster borne from the lava pits. Generates intensive heat that can melt away its enemies.

245.name: Meda Bat
245.description: An eyeball fiend created by a servant of darkness. Uses "Dark Spheres" to blow away its enemies.

246.name: One Who Hunts Souls
246.description: A creature with a sword that gains its power from the life forces of its victims.

247.name: Root Water
247.description: An amphibian capable of calling up a massive tidal wave from the dark seas to wipe out enemy monsters.

248.name: Master & Expert
248.description: A fearsome duo consisting of a beast master and its loyal servant.

249.name: Water Omotics
249.description: Transforms the water overflowing from a jar into attacking dragons.

250.name: Hyo
250.description: An ice warrior whose slightest touch freezes an opponent.

251.name: Enchanting Mermaid
251.description: A beautiful mermaid that lures voyagers to a watery grave.

252.name: Nekogal #1
252.description: A cat creature that looks cute to the eye but delivers scratching blows with its sharp claws.

253.name: Angelwitch
253.description: A creature that chose the path of sorcery to become a witch.

254.name: Embryonic Beast
254.description: A repulsive monster with a gaping belly that swallows almost anything.

255.name: Prevent Rat
255.description: This monster is shielded by a hide covered in thick hair.

256.name: Dimensional Warrior
256.description: A monster capable of creating dimensional rifts to trap its enemies.

257.name: Stone Armadiller
257.description: With a body armored by rock-hard fur, this monster features excellent defense capabilities.

258.name: Beastking of the Swamps
258.description: This creature changes the ground at its feet into quicksand to ensnare its enemies.

259.name: Ancient Sorcerer
259.description: A master fighter that uses various staffs to render enemies unconscious.

260.name: Lunar Queen Elzaim
260.description: A lovely moon goddess that can throw up a lunar curtain to block enemy attacks.

261.name: Wicked Mirror
261.description: A malevolent mirror that hypnotizes a beholder and renders the victim susceptible to attacks.

262.name: The Little Swordsman of Aile
262.description: An elf warrior mounted on a huge lizard.

263.name: Rock Ogre Grotto #2
263.description: A stone golem that turns opponents into rocks and crushes them to dust.

264.name: Wing Egg Elf
264.description: Hiding within its eggshell, this creature blocks enemy attacks with its massive wings.

265.name: The Furious Sea King
265.description: Grand King of the Seven Seas. Able to summon massive tidal waves to drown the enemy.

266.name: Princess of Tsurugi
266.description: A queen of swords that is virtually unequalled in her mastery of every blade imaginable to man.

267.name: Unknown Warrior of Fiend
267.description: The speed of this warrior creates an intense vacuum that can actually slice through a monster's hide.

268.name: Sectarian of Secrets
268.description: A sorcerer that worships the dark forces and can summon a massive hand to drag away opponents into the netherworld.

269.name: Versago the Destroyer
269.description: A lord of destruction born from the heart of darkness, this creature can summon storms to destroy opponents.

270.name: Wetha
270.description: A rain spirit that can summon typhoons to blow away its enemies.

271.name: Megirus Light
271.description: This creature's ominous eyes can unleash piercing rays against its enemies.

272.name: Mavelus
272.description: Related to the phoenix, this creature dwells in the mountains. Its fiery breath is extremely scorching.

273.name: Ancient Tree of Enlightenment
273.description: Armed with a wealth of knowledge, this monster is able to block just about any attack.

274.name: Green Phantom King
274.description: This youthful king of the forests lives in a green world, abundant with trees and wildlife.

275.name: Ground Attacker Bugroth
275.description: A land-based armored robot that is said to once have marine attack capabilities.

276.name: Ray & Temperature
276.description: The Sun and the North Wind join hands to deliver a devastating combination of heat and gale-force winds.

277.name: Gorgon Egg
277.description: A gorgon's egg with eyes said to create whatever creature crosses its view.

278.name: Petit Moth
278.description: Nobody has any idea what creature may spawn from this mysterious larva.

279.name: King Fog
279.description: A spectre that dwells in a blinding curtain of smoke.

280.name: Protector of the Throne
280.description: A creature that protects the king's throne from usurpers.

281.name: Mystic Clown
281.description: Nothing can stop the mad attack of this powerful creature.

282.name: Mystical Sheep #2
282.description: A monstrous sheep with a long tail for hypnotizing enemies to render them powerless.

283.name: Holograh
283.description: A monster machine that generates images to confuse its enemies, making them prone to attacks.

284.name: Tao the Chanter
284.description: A magic-user that corrodes the yin and yang to create a twisted power to attack enemies.

285.name: Serpent Marauder
285.description: A snake with a single eye that blows an icy breath to freeze its opponents.

286.name: Gatekeeper
286.description: An indestructible machine built to protect key entrances.

287.name: Ogre of the Black Shadow
287.description: An ogre possessed by the powers of the dark. Few can withstand its rapid charge.

288.name: Dark Artist
288.description: A demented artist that creates objets d'art to crush enemies.

289.name: Change Slime
289.description: A shape-shifting slime that is capable of adopting the form of other creatures.

290.name: Moon Envoy
290.description: A servant of the moon goddess, this warrior wields a pike with a spectacular crescent-shaped blade.

291.name: Fireyarou
291.description: A malevolent creature wrapped in flames that attacks enemies with intense fire.

292.name: Psychic Kappa
292.description: An amphibian with extrasensory powers for blocking attacks.

293.name: Masaki the Legendary Swordsman
293.description: Legendary swordmaster and a veteran of over 100 battles.

294.name: Dragoness the Wicked Knight
294.description: A warrior equipped with equipment fashioned from dragon scales.

295.name: Bio Plant
295.description: A monstrous creature born from a failed lab experiment.

296.name: One-eyed Shield Dragon
296.description: This dragon wears a shield not only for its own protection but also for ramming its enemies.

297.name: Cyber Soldier of Darkworld
297.description: An unstoppable mechanical soldier powered by dark forces.

298.name: Wicked Dragon with the Ersatz Head
298.description: A two-headed dragon with a pair of vicious jaws for crushing its enemies.

299.name: Sonic Maid
299.description: A maiden that uses sound to her advantage. She wields a scythe that's shaped like a musical note.

300.name: Kurama
300.description: A vicious bird that attacks from the skies with its whip-like tail.

301.name: Legendary Sword
301.description: A sword that brings out the best in warriors. It cannot be used by servants of the dark.

302.name: Sword of Dark Destruction
302.description: Dark forces increase the power of Warriors!

303.name: Dark Energy
303.description: Dark forces increase the power of Fiends and other monsters of the Dark!

304.name: Axe of Despair
304.description: Fiends and Beast-Warriors can constantly use their maximum strength!

305.name: Laser Cannon Armor
305.description: Arms Insects with a powerful laser!

306.name: Insect Armor with Laser Cannon
306.description: Allows Insects to fire an intense blast of fire!

307.name: Elf's Light
307.description: Increases the power of elves with mystical light!

308.name: Beast Fangs
308.description: Increases the power of Beasts and other fanged monsters!

309.name: Steel Shell
309.description: Boosts the power of shelled monsters! Said to have no effect on those without shells.

310.name: Vile Germs
310.description: Vile microbes boost the power of Plants in the woods!

311.name: Black Pendant
311.description: This pendant grants extra power to Dark sorcerers!

312.name: Silver Bow and Arrow
312.description: Silver bow and arrow enhances the power of Fairies.

313.name: Horn of Light
313.description: Increases the power of horned creatures! Has no effect on Dark monsters.

314.name: Horn of the Unicorn
314.description: Increases the power of Dark monsters with horns!

315.name: Dragon Treasure
315.description: A legendary treasure that increases the power of dragons.

316.name: Electro-whip
316.description: A whip for paralyzing enemies. Increases power when equipped with female creatures.

317.name: Cyber Shield
317.description: Increases the power of female monsters by changing their attitudes.

318.name: Elegant Egotist
318.description: Creates two doppelgangers of Harpy Lady for three-pronged attacks!

319.name: Mystical Moon
319.description: Moonlight increases the power of Beasts!

320.name: Stop Defense
320.description: Forces an opponent's monster card positioned for defense into the attack position.

321.name: Malevolent Nuzzler
321.description: Diabolic forces act to increase the power of female and Dark monsters!

322.name: Violet Crystal
322.description: Mystic forces from the crystal increase the power of Zombies.

323.name: Book of Secret Arts
323.description: A magic book for increasing the power of magic-users. It cannot be used by bad-hearted sorcerers.

324.name: Invigoration
324.description: Increases the power of Thunder, Rock, and Pyro monsters.

325.name: Machine Conversion Factory
325.description: A manufacturing facility that tunes up all Machine monsters.

326.name: Raise Body Heat
326.description: Absorbs the sun's energy to increase the power of Dinosaurs!

327.name: Follow Wind
327.description: The winds provide support to increase the power of Winged Beasts and other flying monsters!

328.name: Power of Kaishin
328.description: Poseidon's Strength is shared to boost the power of Aqua, Fish, and Sea Serpent monsters!

329.name: Dragon Capture Jar
329.description: Destroys all opponent Dragon monsters on the playfield!

330.name: Forest
330.description: Changes the field in favor of Beast-Warrior, Insect, Plant, and Beast monsters!

331.name: Wasteland
331.description: Changes the field in favor of Zombie, Dinosaur and Rock monsters!

332.name: Mountain
332.description: Changes the field in favor of Dragon, Winged Beast, and Thunder monsters!

333.name: Sogen
333.description: Changes the field to meadow land in favor of Warrior and Beast-Warrior monsters!

334.name: Umi
334.description: Changes the field in favor of Aqua and Thunder monsters, but unfavorable to Machine and Pyro monsters!

335.name: Yami
335.description: Changes the field in favor of Magic-User and Fiend monsters, but unfavorable to Fairy monsters!

336.name: Dark Hole
336.description: Sucks up every card in play on the field!

337.name: Raigeki
337.description: Destroys every opposing monster with a stroke of lightning!

338.name: Mooyan Curry
338.description: A delicious beef curry increases Life Points by 200!

339.name: Red Medicine
339.description: A magic potion that increases Life Points by 500!

340.name: Goblin's Secret Remedy
340.description: A goblin's herb that increases Life Points by 1000!

341.name: Soul of the Pure
341.description: A fairy potion that increases Life Points by 2000!

342.name: Dian Keto the Cure Master
342.description: A mystical power that increases Life Points by 5000!

343.name: Sparks
343.description: A shower of sparks inflicts 50 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points!!

344.name: Hinotama
344.description: A fireball inflicts 100 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points!!

345.name: Final Flame
345.description: Flames inflict 200 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points!!

346.name: Ookazi
346.description: Flames inflict 500 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points!

347.name: Tremendous Fire
347.description: An inferno inflicts 1000 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points!

348.name: Swords of Revealing Light
348.description: Enemy monsters are revealed and your opponent cannot attack for three turns.

349.name: Spellbinding Circle
349.description: A curse reduces the power of all enemy monsters!

350.name: Dark-piercing Light
350.description: A dazzling light reveals all monsters on the playing field.

351.name: Yaranzo
351.description: A monster that attacks anybody who attempts to open its lid.

352.name: Kanan the Swordmistress
352.description: A lady swordsman that floats like a butterfly and stings like a bee.

353.name: Takriminos
353.description: A finned creature distantly related to sea Dragons.

354.name: Stuffed Animal
354.description: A deceptively cute stuffed animal that bites.

355.name: Megasonic Eye
355.description: A cryptic doomsday machine that comes from the edge of the universe.

356.name: Super War-lion
356.description: A very vicious lion with sharp and long claws.

358.name: Seiyaryu
358.description: A sacred dragon that burns away wickedness with its mystical flames.

359.name: Three-legged Zombies
359.description: Bony and Tubby, a friendly pair of skeletons.

360.name: Zera The Mant
360.description: A huge, brutal monster that attacks with razor-sharp claws.

361.name: Flying Penguin
361.description: A rare penguin that flies with the wings on its head.

362.name: Millennium Shield
362.description: A Millennium Item candidate that is said to block any powerful attack.

363.name: Fairy's Gift
363.description: Flies around spreading happiness to all.

364.name: Black Luster Soldier
364.description: A powerful warrior with the same capabilities as the legendary Blue-eyes White Dragon.

365.name: Fiend's Mirror
365.description: An arcane glass that draws its enemies into the mirror world.

366.name: Labyrinth Wall
366.description: Walls appear on the field to form a labyrinth with no exit.

367.name: Jirai Gumo
367.description: A monster spider that dwells under the earth.

368.name: Shadow Ghoul
368.description: A dangerous zombie that crawls in the dark.

369.name: Wall Shadow
369.description: An unusually fast monster that sweeps across walls to attack its enemies.

370.name: Labyrinth Tank
370.description: A tank that races around a labyrinth hunting down its enemies.

371.name: Sanga of the Thunder
371.description: A golem that uses lightning attacks similar to the Labyrinth Brothers.

372.name: Kazejin
372.description: A golem that controls the winds like the Labyrinth Brothers.

373.name: Suijin
373.description: A golem that uses water attacks like the Labyrinth Brothers.

374.name: Gate Guardian
374.description: Sanga, Kazejin, and Suijin join to form a single, powerful monster.

375.name: Dungeon Worm
375.description: Hidden under the floors of a labyrinth, it swallows any who pass above.

376.name: Monster Tamer
376.description: A master of monsters that exercises control over several creatures.

377.name: Ryu-kishin Powered
377.description: Ryu-kishin enhanced by the powers of darkness. Very sharp talons make it a worthy opponent.

378.name: Swordstalker
378.description: A monster formed by the vengeful souls of those who passed away in battle.

379.name: La Jinn the Mystical Genie
379.description: A genie of the lamp that's at the beck and call of its master.

380.name: Blue-eyes Ultimate Dragon
380.description: The ultimate dragon formed by the fusion of three Blue-eyes White Dragons.

381.name: Toon Alligator
381.description: An alligator monster straight from the cartoons.

382.name: Rude Kaiser
382.description: With an axe in each hand, this monster delivers heavy damage.

383.name: Parrot Dragon
383.description: A dragon from the cartoons that's more dangerous than it appears to be.

384.name: Dark Rabbit
384.description: A cartoon rabbit that quickly leaps all over the place, making it a difficult target.

385.name: Bickuribox
385.description: A jack-in-the-box that excels in surprise attacks.

386.name: Harpie's Pet Dragon
386.description: A favorite pet for harpies, but a very dangerous dragon.

387.name: Mystic Lamp
387.description: A lamp used by wizards to mix potions.

388.name: Pendulum Machine
388.description: A horrible torture machine with a large pendulum blade.

389.name: Giltia the D. Knight
389.description: Armed with a soul-searing spear, this creature favors magic attacks.

390.name: Launcher Spider
390.description: A spider machine that launches explosive rockets against its enemies.

391.name: Zoa
391.description: A monster whose full potential can be achieved when transformed into its metal form.

392.name: Metalzoa
392.description: A metallic Zoa capable of intensive attacks.

393.name: Zone Eater
393.description: A sea creature that swallows enemies and slowly digests them.

394.name: Steel Scorpion
394.description: An iron-tailed monster equipped with very sharp scissors.

395.name: Dancing Elf
395.description: An elf that dances across the sky with wings of razor-sharp blades.

396.name: Ocubeam
396.description: Frightening in appearance, this creature uses its large eyes and ears to keep track of any movement.

397.name: Leghul
397.description: Not a very powerful monster despite its large fangs and spikes.

398.name: Ooguchi
398.description: A monstrous bullfrog with poison spikes.

399.name: Swordsman from a Foreign Land
399.description: An eastern warrior armed with a cursed sword.

400.name: Emperor of the Land and Sea

401.name: Ushi Oni
401.description: A bull monster resurrected by the dark arts that appears from inside a jar.

402.name: Monster Eye
402.description: A servant that maintains a close watch on anything and everything. It throws up a smokescreen when discovered.

403.name: Leogun
403.description: Huge monster with a lion's mane similar to the "King of Beasts".

404.name: Tatsunootoshigo
404.description: A fast-moving sea monster that has the bodies of a horse and a fish.

405.name: Saber Slasher
405.description: A rampaging machine that wields a massive sword.

406.name: Yaiba Robo
406.description: A machine with several blades hidden within its square body.

407.name: Machine King
407.description: Armored with super alloy, this robot attacks with blasts of fire launched from both arms.

408.name: Giant Mech-soldier
408.description: This monster swings an earth-shaking axe that can eliminate enemies with a single blow.

409.name: Metal Dragon
409.description: A golden, fire-breathing dragon that burns any opponent in its path.

410.name: Mechanical Spider
410.description: A spider-shaped, mechanized monster with sickles at the end of its legs.

411.name: Bat
411.description: A mechanized bat that attacks by dropping explosion orbs.

412.name: Giga-tech Wolf
412.description: A wolf made entirely of iron. Its steel jaws can bite through anything.

413.name: Cyber Soldier
413.description: Round-shaped soldiers that roll around and act as guardians to the Machine King.

414.name: Shovel Crusher
414.description: Armed with a pair of shovels, this creature is a walking engine of destruction.

415.name: Mechanicalchacer
415.description: A hunter that relentlessly pursues its target by order of the Machine King.

416.name: Blocker
416.description: Each separate part of this creature is an individual weapon capable of devastating attacks.

417.name: Blast Juggler
417.description: A walking time device that loves to blow enemies away.

418.name: Golgoil
418.description: A massive iron golem that appears from a dimensional rift.

419.name: Giganto
419.description: This creature swings around a huge spiked ball to destroy its enemies.

420.name: Cyber-Stein
420.description: Created in a basement lab, this infernal machine launches rockets from within its mouth.

421.name: Cyber Commander
421.description: A strike force equipped with rader detectors and sensors.

422.name: Jinzo #7
422.description: Created in an underground lab, this artificial being occasionally goes berserk.

423.name: Dice Armadillo
423.description: An armadillo-like creature that forms a die whenever it rolls up its body.

424.name: Sky Dragon
424.description: A bird-like dragon with four bladed wings.

425.name: Thunder Dragon
425.description: A dragon that summons thunder and lightning to attack its opponents.

426.name: Stone D.
426.description: With a body consisting entirely of rocks, this dragon flings boulders at its enemies.

427.name: Kaiser Dragon
427.description: A very proud and powerful dragon emperor.

428.name: Magician of Faith
428.description: Despite its weak strength, this creature is capable of casting spells to eliminate darkness.

429.name: Goddess of Whim
429.description: A shy goddess that seems to spend the majority of her time sleeping.

430.name: Water Magician
430.description: This creature surrounds opponents with water and envelops them in a sweeping attack.

431.name: Ice Water
431.description: A very aggressive mermaid with spikes for attacking enemies.

432.name: Waterdragon Fairy
432.description: A fairy that wanders the seas. Rumored to have the capabilities for summoning sea dragons.

433.name: Ancient Elf
433.description: This elf is rumored to have lived for thousands of years. He leads an army of spirits against his enemies.

434.name: Beautiful Beast Trainer
434.description: A rare female magic-user armed with a vicious whip.

435.name: Water Girl
435.description: A beautiful creature that flings icy arrows.

436.name: White Dolphin
436.description: A white, horned dolphin that attacks by calling up tidal waves.

437.name: Deepsea Shark
437.description: A violent shark that attacks anything in the sea.

438.name: Metal Fish
438.description: A steel fish armed with a sharp dorsal fin.

439.name: Bottom Dweller
439.description: A beautiful swimmer with a very nasty temperament.

440.name: 7 Colored Fish
440.description: A rare rainbow fish that is almost impossible to catch.

441.name: Mech Bass
441.description: This creature carries a plasma cannon on its back.

442.name: Aqua Dragon
442.description: A dragon that dwells in the sea. It is capable of spitting high-pressure blasts of water.

443.name: Sea King Dragon
443.description: The king of the seas, this creature is protected by a solid shell and spits poisonous bubbles at its enemies.

444.name: Turu-Purun
444.description: A strange, one-eyed monster armed with a dangerous spear.

445.name: Guardian of the Sea
445.description: A merman warrior that attacks anyone who dares to pollute the sea.

446.name: Aqua Snake
446.description: A creature that drowns its opponents by mesmerizing them with the ball on the end of its tail.

447.name: Giant Red Seasnake
447.description: A sea serpent that bites anything that passes nearby.

448.name: Spike Seadra
448.description: Using the spikes sprouting from its body, this creature stabs its opponents and floods them with electricity.

449.name: 30,000-Year White Turtle
449.description: A massive and well-protected giant turtle that has lived over 30000 years.

450.name: Kappa Avenger
450.description: An amphibian sworn to avenge the death of its brothers.

451.name: Kanikabuto
451.description: A crab monster with two massive scissors for cutting up enemies.

452.name: Zarigun
452.description: A newly evolved crayfish with sharp scissors for clipping the enemy.

453.name: Millennium Golem
453.description: A golem that has protected treasure for nearly a millennium.

454.name: Destroyer Golem
454.description: A golem with a massive right hand for crushing its victims.

455.name: Barrel Rock
455.description: A monster that charges into enemies firing a pair of cannons mounted on its shoulders.

456.name: Minomushi Warrior
456.description: A rock warrior that wields a very heavy sword carved from stone.

457.name: Stone Ghost
457.description: A creature that erupts with anger, resulting in a crushing rain of boulders.

458.name: Kaminari Attack
458.description: A monster that judges wrong-doers and punishes them appropriately.

459.name: Tripwire Beast
459.description: This creature attacks enemies with electromagnetic waves.

460.name: Bolt Escargot
460.description: This creature spits a gooey substance that robs enemies of mobility and then stuns them with electric shocks.

461.name: Bolt Penguin
461.description: A monster with a pair of electric whips instead of arms.

462.name: The Immortal of Thunder
462.description: A creature that attacks enemies with thunderbolts.

463.name: Electric Snake
463.description: A serpent with a tail for storing electricity.

464.name: Wing Eagle
464.description: A hunter of the skies that has never missed a target.

465.name: Punished Eagle
465.description: A judge of the skies that delivers a sentence with its punishing silver-white claws.

466.name: Skull Red Bird
466.description: This monster swoops down and attacks with a rain of knives stored in its wings.

467.name: Crimson Sunbird
467.description: A monster burning with crimson flames and capable of delivering a rain of sparks by flapping its wings.

468.name: Queen Bird
468.description: A creature that attacks its enemies with its large beak.

469.name: Armed Ninja
469.description: A blue ninja that attacks with a large sickle and spiked feet.

470.name: Magical Ghost
470.description: This creature casts a spell of terror and confusion just before attacking its enemies.

471.name: Soul Hunter
471.description: This clown feeds the life force of its enemies to a monstrous lizard.

472.name: Air Eater
472.description: A monster that suffocates its enemy by feeding on the surrounding air supply.

473.name: Vermillion Sparrow
473.description: A fiery warrior creature that unleashes intense heat from its body.

474.name: Sea Kamen
474.description: A cruel monster that slices up enemies with its sharp claws.

475.name: Sinister Serpent
475.description: A flying poison snake that is not very good at maneuvering on the ground.

476.name: Ganigumo
476.description: A spider armed with scissors to attack anything that it traps in its web.

477.name: Alinsection
477.description: A stag beetle monster with saw-toothed horn and arms.

478.name: Insect Soldiers of the Sky
478.description: Insect soldiers that attack in swarms.

479.name: Cockroach Knight
479.description: A cockroach warrior that hides in small spaces and emerges to attack enemies.

480.name: Kuwagata a
480.description: A violent stag beetle with a razor-like cutter.

481.name: Burglar
481.description: A clever mouse with a sharpened left claw.

482.name: Pragtical
482.description: A very dangerous monster with spikes on its head and tail.

483.name: Garvas
483.description: A malevolent creature that resembles a winged lion.

484.name: Ameba
484.description: A monster that envelops an enemy and slowly digests it.

485.name: Korogashi
485.description: This creature rolls massive objects to crush its enemies.

486.name: Boo Koo
486.description: A book wizard with page after page of potent spells.

487.name: Flower Wolf
487.description: A beast covered in flowers from head to toe.

488.name: Rainbow Flower
488.description: A flower creature with rainbow-colored blossoms that lure an enemy into its waiting jaws.

489.name: Barrel Lily
489.description: A dangerous flower that fires pollen projectiles.

490.name: Needle Ball
490.description: A ball covered in sharp needles. Usually rains down on enemies in a group.

491.name: Peacock
491.description: A beautiful peacock- like creature that fires its feathers at opponents.

492.name: Hoshiningen
492.description: Trailed by a beautiful tail, this shooting star inflicts damage when it hits an enemy.

493.name: Maha Vailo
493.description: A wizard dressed in blue who is usually found meditating.

494.name: Rainbow Marine Mermaid
494.description: An unusual mermaid that appears whenever a rainbow bridges the sky.

495.name: Musician King
495.description: A fantastic guitar player that attacks enemies with ultrasonic emissions.

496.name: Wilmee
496.description: A ferocious rabbit with sharp claws.

497.name: Yado Karu
497.description: A hermit crab with the head of a dragon.

498.name: Morinphen
498.description: A strange fiend with long arms and razor-sharp talons.

499.name: Kattapillar
499.description: Attacks by blowing webs at its enemies. Nobody knows what the final form of this insect might be.

500.name: Dragon Seeker
500.description: A fearsome monster sent from the netherworld to destroy dragons.

501.name: Man-eater Bug
501.description: A creature that slices and dices with its scissors and feeds off its victims.

502.name: D. Human
502.description: Gifted with the power of dragons, this warrior wields a sword created from a dragon's fang.

503.name: Turtle Raccoon
503.description: A fox-like creature with a protective shell.

504.name: Fungi of the Musk
504.description: A monster that leaks acid from its pores to melt anything that touches its skin.

505.name: Prisman
505.description: A clear crystal that focuses light to create a powerful laser beam.

506.name: Gale Dogra
506.description: A huge moth that generates a whirlwind containing poison dust.

507.name: Crazy Fish
507.description: A flying fish with a sharp head for piercing targets.

508.name: Cyber Saurus
508.description: A mechanical dinosaur equipped with a beam cannon.

509.name: Bracchio-raidus
509.description: A colossal dinosaur that stomps on anything that wanders into its path.

510.name: Laughing Flower
510.description: A laughing flower whose chuckles can drive an enemy mad.

511.name: Bean Soldier
511.description: A plant warrior that attacks with a combination of sword-swings and pea projectiles.

512.name: Cannon Soldier
512.description: A highly destructive machine armed with a powerful cannon.

513.name: Guardian of the Throne Room
513.description: A sentry robot armed with homing rockets for guarding throne rooms from intruders.

514.name: Brave Scizzar
514.description: A creature capable of manipulating several scissors with definite results.

515.name: The Statue of Easter Island
515.description: A massive stone idol from Easter Island that fires laser rings from its mouth.

516.name: Muka Muka
516.description: A monster that angers an opponent to the point that the enemy goes berserk.

517.name: Sand Stone
517.description: Appears from underground and attacks with long, snake-like tentacles.

518.name: Boulder Tortoise
518.description: A stone turtle with a very high defense factor.

519.name: Fire Kraken
519.description: A fiery squid that can maintain its flames underwater.

520.name: Turtle Bird
520.description: A rare flying turtle that inhabits the sea.

521.name: Skullbird
521.description: The breath from this bird robs creatures of their life force.

522.name: Monstrous Bird
522.description: A huge bird known for its sharp dive attacks.

523.name: The Bistro Butcher
523.description: Defeated enemies serve as ingredients for this gourmet monster.

524.name: Star Boy
524.description: An extraterrestrial life form that loves living in water.

525.name: Spirit of the Mountain
525.description: Music from this creature's flute can drain an enemy's willpower.

526.name: Neck Hunter
526.description: Armed with a huge sickle, this monster can fire beams from its large eyes.

527.name: Milus Radiant
527.description: Often mistaken as a cute pet, this creature is a very dangerous beast.

528.name: Togex
528.description: A very fast monster that rolls up and rams its enemies.

529.name: Flame Cerebrus
529.description: A flaming beast that is lethal to the touch.

530.name: Eldeen
530.description: Uses a wand to cast various spells against an enemy.

531.name: Mystical Sand
531.description: Turns enemies to stone and crushes them to dust.

532.name: Gemini Elf
532.description: Elf twins that attack an enemy from opposite sides.

533.name: Kwagar Hercules
533.description: An insect monster with the jaws of a stag beetle and the horn of a beetle.

534.name: Minar
534.description: A monster with four highly dexterous arms for executing separate attacks.

535.name: Kamakiriman
535.description: A man-shaped mantis with two razor-sharp scythes.

536.name: Mechaleon
536.description: A chameleon-like monster that can hide anywhere by changing colors.

537.name: Mega Thunderball
537.description: Rolls along the ground releasing bolts of electricity to attack its enemies.

538.name: Niwatori
538.description: Swallows enemies whole and uses their essence as energy.

539.name: Corroding Shark
539.description: A zombie shark that wanders the ocean depths, cursing any that dare cross its path.

540.name: Skelengel
540.description: A phantom fairy that fires countless arrows at anything that harbors an urge to attack.

541.name: Hane-Hane
541.description: This creature blocks enemy movement with gale-force winds and attacks with a massive battle axe.

542.name: Misairuzame
542.description: A rocket-launching fish protected by thorny spikes.

543.name: Tongyo
543.description: This creature is powered by the life force of the fishes it captures with its long tongue.

544.name: Dharma Cannon
544.description: A highly accurate mechanical monster covered with large- caliber cannons.

545.name: Skelgon
545.description: A skeletal zombie dragon that is capable of flying across the skies.

546.name: Wow Warrior
546.description: A massive beast of a fish with arms, legs, and razor-sharp teeth.

547.name: Griggle
547.description: This monster spins about its enemy launching blinding leaves and painful seeds.

548.name: Bone Mouse
548.description: A zombie rat that hunts felines.

549.name: Frog The Jam
549.description: A slime creature with a frog's head that croaks as it attacks.

550.name: Behegon
550.description: A strange sea serpent with a massive mouth lined with huge fangs.

551.name: Dark Elf
551.description: A wicked elf that just loves to engage in battle.

552.name: Winged Dragon #2
552.description: Creates powerful tornadoes with its huge wings.

553.name: Mushroom Man #2
553.description: A fully grown Mushroom Man with an increased attack factor.

554.name: Lava Battleguard
554.description: This brother of Swamp Battleguard may not be powerful, but is pretty good on defense.

555.name: Tyhone #2
555.description: A crimson dragon that spits fireballs at its enemies.

556.name: The Wandering Doomed
556.description: A monster that aimlessly wanders in search of enemies.

557.name: Steel Ogre Grotto #1
557.description: A steel idol worshipped in the Land of Machines.

558.name: Pot the Trick
558.description: A not very reliable sorcerer's servant.

559.name: Oscillo Hero
559.description: A strange warrior from another dimension.

560.name: Invader from Another Dimension
560.description: A creature that came from another galaxy.

561.name: Lesser Dragon
561.description: A low-class, minor dragon incapable of breathing fire.

562.name: Needle Worm
562.description: A larva with steel spikes to attack the unwary.

563.name: Wretched Ghost of the Attic
563.description: A harmless creature usually found in the attic of any home.

564.name: Great Mammoth of Goldfine
564.description: A very unusual skeletal zombie elephant with glowing gold bones.

565.name: Man-eating Black Shark
565.description: A black shark that can detect almost any scent in the water.

566.name: Yormungarde
566.description: A very long snake that often appears in legends and myths.

567.name: Darkworld Thorns
567.description: A thorny plant found in the darklands that wraps itself around any unwary traveler.

568.name: Anthrosaurus
568.description: Man-like dinosaur lacking in strength, but with a high I.Q.

569.name: Drooling Lizard
569.description: A blood-sucking snake in human form that attacks any living being that passes nearby.

570.name: Trakadon
570.description: A tiger-striped dragon that is often seen racing across the wasteland with tremendous speed.

571.name: B. Dragon Jungle King
571.description: A jet-black dragon that inhabits the jungles and feeds on trees.

572.name: Empress Judge
572.description: Empress of the Golden Kingdom. None may refuse her will.

573.name: Little D
573.description: A very ferocious monster spawned from a T-Rex.

574.name: Witch of the Black Forest
574.description: This forest-dwelling witch can see all with the eye on her forehead.

575.name: Ancient One of the Deep Forest
575.description: A white goat that has inhabited the forest for ages. The creature is actually an elder of the woods.

576.name: Giant Scorpion of the Tundra
576.description: A rare scarlet scorpion that can be found in the tundra -- not in the desert.

577.name: Crow Goblin
577.description: A very wise, long-nosed goblin with supernatural powers.

578.name: Leo Wizard
578.description: A wizard with a black cape that is actually a talking lion disguised as a man.

579.name: Abyss Flower
579.description: A rare flower that blooms in a pitch-dark abyss.

580.name: Patrol Robo
580.description: A cutting-edge robot that eliminates intruders upon detection.

581.name: Takuhee
581.description: This bird is a precursor to disaster!!

582.name: Dark Witch
582.description: A popular creature in mythology that delivers judgement with a sharp spear.

583.name: Weather Report
583.description: This creature is known to predict the weather with very little accuracy.

584.name: Binding Chain
584.description: This creature corners its enemies and seals away their power.

585.name: Mechanical Snail
585.description: A mechanically enhanced snail that is no faster than it used to be.

586.name: Greenkappa
586.description: A creature that transforms into the image of its enemy and copies every offensive move.

587.name: Mon Larvas
587.description: A highly evolved Larvas that is even more powerful than before.

588.name: Living Vase
588.description: A living vase that blinds enemies with pollen and attacks with its sharp teeth.

589.name: Tentacle Plant
589.description: Attacks a nearby opponent by reaching out with its blue vines.

590.name: Beaked Snake
590.description: Wraps its coils around opponents and pecks them with its huge beak.

591.name: Morphing Jar
591.description: A large jar that attacks nearby enemies by unleashing the monster it contains inside.

592.name: Muse-A
592.description: A fairy of the arts and an excellent harp player.

593.name: Giant Turtle Who Feeds on Flames
593.description: A monster turtle with a crimson shell. It feeds on fire.

594.name: Rose Spectre of Dunn
594.description: A red rose possessed by a vile spirit that feeds on the life force of others to provide the flower with nourishment.

595.name: Fiend Refrection #1
595.description: Drags enemies into a mirror world.

596.name: Ghoul with an Appetite
596.description: A monster that can eat all it wants but is never fulfilled.

597.name: Pale Beast
597.description: With skin tinged a bluish white, this strange creature is a fearsome sight to behold.

598.name: Little Chimera
598.description: A monster created from an experimental attempt to graft wings on beasts.

599.name: Violent Rain
599.description: A monster capable of bringing on sudden rain showers.

600.name: Key Mace #2
600.description: Seals away the good in a soul to create a wicked being.

601.name: Tenderness
601.description: A cute fairy dedicated to bringing about eternal love.

602.name: Penguin Soldier
602.description: A low-class penguin soldier that attacks in a group.

603.name: Fairy Dragon
603.description: A beautiful and powerful dragon fairy.

604.name: Obese Marmot of Nefariousness
604.description: An ill-mannered field mouse that chews on anything.

605.name: Liquid Beast
605.description: A liquid life form that moves freely in water.

606.name: Twin Long Rods #2
606.description: An undersea creature that attacks with two whip-like tails.

607.name: Great Bill
607.description: A monster with a massive maw that allows it to swallow an enemy whole.

609.name: Bladefly
609.description: A monster fly that swoops down with sharp sword-like arms extended out front.

610.name: Electric Lizard
610.description: A lizard that discharges electricity stored in its body.

611.name: Hiro's Shadow Scout
611.description: A servant of fiends used primarily for scouting an area.

612.name: Lady of Faith
612.description: Soothes the souls of others by chanting a mysterious spell.

613.name: Twin-headed Thunder Dragon
613.description: A two-headed Thunder Dragon capable of powerful electric attacks.

614.name: Hunter Spider
614.description: A hunter that uses its spider web to entrap its enemies.

615.name: Armored Starfish
615.description: A bluish starfish with a solid hide capable of fending off attacks.

616.name: Hourglass of Courage
616.description: A fairy that controls the feelings of others, instilling them with bravery.

617.name: Marine Beast
617.description: A sea creature with sharp teeth that won't release a victim once they're locked on.

618.name: Warrior of Tradition
618.description: A lady warrior drenched in the essence from a thousand battlefields.

619.name: Rock Spirit
619.description: A clay idol representing a rock spirit. The creature has significant attack and defense factors.

620.name: Snakeyashi
620.description: A creature made up of several snakes that attack separately in battle.

621.name: Succubus Knight
621.description: A vile warrior wizard adept at casting doom-dealing spells.

622.name: Ill Witch
622.description: Controls air currents and can generate a sudden gust of wind to blow away an opponent.

623.name: The Thing That Hides in the Mud
623.description: The appearance of this creature is preceded by the ground melting under an opponent's feet.

624.name: High Tide Gyojin
624.description: An amphibian warrior that can easily navigate beneath the waters.

625.name: Fairy of the Fountain
625.description: A fairy dedicated to protecting fountains from pollution.

626.name: Amazon of the Seas
626.description: A mermaid sentry serving the Sea King and his kingdom.

627.name: Nekogal #2
627.description: This fast creature can easily elude enemy attacks and counter them with its vicious claws.

628.name: Witch's Apprentice
628.description: An inexperienced witch who just started learning the mystic arts.

629.name: Armored Rat
629.description: A rat that is protected by armor-like fur.

631.name: Maiden of the Moonlight
631.description: A lunar sorcerer that uses mystical spells to induce hallucinations.

632.name: Stone Ogre Grotto
632.description: A rock giant consisting of massive boulders.

634.name: Night Lizard
634.description: A green-scaled lizard warrior dedicated to protecting the sea.

635.name: Queen's Double
635.description: Not very useful double of a queen.

636.name: Blue-winged Crown
636.description: A bird that glows with blue flames and has a head of hair shaped like a crown.

637.name: Trent
637.description: A protector of the forest, this massive tree continues to grow.

638.name: Queen of Autumn Leaves
638.description: Queen of the Tree Spirit who is embraced by brilliant autumn leaves.

639.name: Amphibious Bugroth
639.description: A Bugroth unit modified for underwater warfare.

640.name: Acid Crawler
640.description: A gigantic caterpillar that spits acid capable of melting almost anything.

641.name: Invader of the Throne
641.description: A scheming queen who covets the king's throne during his absence.

642.name: Mystical Sheep #1
642.description: A black-haired sheep that is capable of sorcery.

643.name: Disk Magician
643.description: A creature that hides in a saucer and appears only to attack enemies.

645.name: Royal Guard
645.description: Mechanical soldier with a mind of its own. Originally created to protect members of the royal family.

646.name: Gruesome Goo
646.description: Looks like any other slime, but definitely much more powerful!

647.name: Hyosube
647.description: This amphibian creature boasts a high attack factor, but not much of one for defense.

648.name: Machine Attacker
648.description: A machine designed to blitz its enemies.

649.name: Hibikime
649.description: Confuses enemy monsters with noise that is harsh to the ears.

650.name: Whiptail Crow
650.description: Attacks from the skies with a whip-like tail.

651.name: Kunai with Chain
651.description: A boomerang featuring the effects of two cards: the Legendary Sword and the Sword of Dark Destruction.

652.name: Magical Labyrinth
652.description: A card for boosting the power of the Labyrinth Wall.

653.name: Warrior Elimination
653.description: Destroys all opponent Warrior cards played on the field.

654.name: Salamandra
654.description: Increases the strength of those who control the power of Salamandra.

655.name: Cursebreaker
655.description: Cancels the magic over all level-reduced monsters and sets them at level 0.

657.name: Megamorph
657.description: A card that increases the power of any selected monster by 2 levels.

658.name: Metalmorph
658.description: A card that changes any selected monster to a Machine monster.

659.name: Winged Trumpeter
659.description: A horn that increases the power of Fairy creatures.

660.name: Stain Storm
660.description: Acid rain destroys an opponent's Machine monsters.

661.name: Crush Card
661.description: Opponent monsters in play with attack factors of 1500 or more are eliminated.

662.name: Eradicating Aerosol
662.description: An insecticide for wiping out an opponent's Insect monsters that are currently in play.

663.name: Breath of Light
663.description: A magic wind that reduces to rubble an opponent's Rock monsters that are currently in play.

664.name: Eternal Draught
664.description: A blast of heat dries up and eliminates an opponent's Fish monsters that are currently in play.

665.name: Curse of Millennium Shield
665.description: Sacrifices the monster with the highest defense rating and summons Shield.

666.name: Yamadron Ritual
666.description: Sacrifices Beast-Warrior, Dragon, and Pyro monsters to summon Yamadron.

667.name: Gate Guardian Ritual
667.description: Sacrifices Kazejin, Suijin, and Sanga of the Thunder to summon Gate Guardian.

668.name: Bright Castle
668.description: A glaring light that increases the power of all monsters.

669.name: Shadow Spell
669.description: Decreases an opponent's in-play monsters by two levels.

670.name: Black Luster Ritual
670.description: Ceremony conducted to summon Black Luster Soldier. Sacrifice required.

671.name: Zera Ritual
671.description: Ceremony conducted to summon Zera. Sacrifice required.

672.name: Harpie's Feather Duster
672.description: Destroys all opponent Magic cards that are in play.

673.name: War-lion Ritual
673.description: Ceremony conducted to summon War Lion. Sacrifice required.

674.name: Beastry Mirror Ritual
674.description: Ceremony conducted to summon Fiend's Mirror. Sacrifice required.

675.name: Ultimate Dragon
675.description: Sacrifice three Blue-eyes to summon Ultimate Dragon.

676.name: Commencement Dance
676.description: Sacrifice Dancer and Warrior to summon Performance of Sword.

677.name: Hamburger Recipe
677.description: A card with the ingredients for making a delicious hamburger.

678.name: Revival of Sennen Genjin
678.description: Sacrifice Beast-Warrior and Golem to summon Sengenjin.

679.name: Novox's Prayer
679.description: Sacrifice Warrior and Scythe Wielder to summon Skull Guardian.

680.name: Curse of Tri-Horned Dragon
680.description: Sacrifice a horned monster to summon Tri-Horned Dragon.

681.name: House of Adhesive Tape
681.description: Monsters with Attack Factors of 500 or lower are eliminated from the play field.

682.name: Eatgaboon
682.description: Monsters with Attack Factors of 1000 or lower are eliminated from the play field.

683.name: Bear Trap
683.description: When an opposing monster's Attack Factor is 1500 or lower, it is eliminated from the play field.

684.name: Invisible Wire
684.description: When an opposing monster's Attack Factor is 2000 or lower, it is eliminated from the play field.

685.name: Acid Trap Hole
685.description: When an opposing monster's Attack Factor is 3000 or lower, it is eliminated from the play field.

686.name: Widespread Ruin
686.description: When an opponent's monster attacks, it is blown to smithereens and eliminated from the play field.

687.name: Goblin Fan
687.description: Reflects the damage of direct attack cards like Fire Sparks and Inferno back to your opponent.

688.name: Bad Reaction to Simochi
688.description: A card that reverses the effects of recovery cards and transforms the points to damage.

689.name: Reverse Trap
689.description: A card that reverses the effects of power-up cards and transforms the effects to power reduction.

690.name: Fake Trap
690.description: A trap card for tricking your opponent. Nothing happens when it is attacked.

691.name: Revived of Serpent Night Dragon
691.description: Select a specific monster for sacrifice and summon Serpent Night Dragon.

692.name: Turtle Oath
692.description: Sacrifice crab and turtle to summon Crab Turtle.

693.name: Contruct of Mask
693.description: Sacrifice a masked one to summon a new mask.

694.name: Resurrection of Chakra
694.description: Sacrifice 3 Fiend monsters to conduct the ritual for the Resurrection of Chakra.

695.name: Puppet Ritual
695.description: Sacrifice Puppeteer and Machine monsters to summon the Puppet.

696.name: Javelin Beetle Pact
696.description: Sacrifice the stag beetle and beetle to summon Javelin Beetle.

697.name: Garma Sword Oath
697.description: Sacrifice the Ashura's Arm and Sword-wielder to summon.

698.name: Cosmo Queen's Prayer
698.description: Sacrifice a normal Queen to summon Cosmo Queen.

699.name: Revival of Skeleton Rider
699.description: Sacrifice Temple and Cockroach to summon Dokurorider.

700.name: Fortress Whale's Oath
700.description: Sacrifice Horn and Machine Fish to summon Sea Fortress.

701.name: Performance of Sword
701.description: A warrior dancer with fancy dance steps.

702.name: Hungry Burger
