702.description: Attracts hungry enemies with tasty aromas and eats them when they get close enough.

703.name: Sengenjin
703.description: A headstrong, primitive man equipped with a Millennium Item.

704.name: Skull Guardian
704.description: A guardian of the law that doesn't forgive cheating. Attacks enemies with its sword-like arms.

705.name: Tri-horned Dragon
705.description: A wicked dragon with three horns protruding from its head.

706.name: Serpent Night Dragon
706.description: A dragon created from the soul of a wicked knight.

707.name: Skull Knight
707.description: A monk who has conducted several rituals in the netherworld, and who is capable of using both weapons and magic.

708.name: Cosmo Queen
708.description: A queen who rules over all the stars in the universe.

709.name: Chakra
709.description: A twisting shape that attacks with tentacle-like arms.

710.name: Crab Turtle
710.description: A creature with a turtle shell and crab scissors to provide high attack and defense factors.

711.name: Mikazukinoyaiba
711.description: A dragon warrior armed with a crescent-shaped sword. Rumored to be from the moon.

712.name: Meteor Dragon
712.description: A dragon that arrived on earth by means of a comet that fell from the far reaches of space.

713.name: Meteor B. Dragon
713.description: With the burning hide of a meteorite, this creature vaporizes all that it touches.

714.name: Firewing Pegasus
714.description: A heavenly stallion that flies across the skies on scarlet wings.

715.name: Psycho-Puppet
715.description: A mysterious doll with a strange dance that robs the power of opposing monsters.

716.name: Garma Sword
716.description: A skilled warrior that wields six swords against opposing monsters.

717.name: Javelin Beetle
717.description: A creature with lethal scissors that cut through almost anything.

718.name: Fortress Whale
718.description: A sea monster with a cannon mounted on its back to blow its enemies out of the water.

719.name: Dokurorider
719.description: A lonely rider that races across the wasteland, raising thick clouds of dust.

720.name: Mask of Shine & Dark
720.description: A creature that twists the fabric of light and darkness to generate images to confuse opponents.

721.name: Dark Magic Ritual
721.description: Ceremony for summoning the Magician of Black Chaos. Sacrifice required.

722.name: Magician of Black Chaos
722.description: The ultimate magic-user, who wields the power of chaos borne from the fusion of Dark and Light.

1.name: Simon Muran
1.title: The Guardian
1.flavor: An ancient sage who watches over the Millennium Items.

2.name: Jono
2.title: Loyal Friend
2.flavor: A loyal companion from the village.

3.name: Teana
3.title: Village Priestess
3.flavor: A kind-hearted priestess from the village.

4.name: Villager
4.title: Simple Farmer
4.flavor: A villager who enjoys card games.

5.name: Villager
5.title: Wandering Merchant
5.flavor: A traveling merchant with a few cards.

6.name: Villager
6.title: Village Elder
6.flavor: The most experienced duelist in the village.

7.name: Rex Raptor
7.title: Dinosaur Duelist
7.flavor: A duelist who commands powerful dinosaurs.

8.name: Weevil Underwood
8.title: Insect Master
8.flavor: A cunning strategist who wields insects.

9.name: Mai Valentine
9.title: Harpy Lady
9.flavor: An elegant duelist with powerful winged beasts.

10.name: Bandit Keith
10.title: Machine Commander
10.flavor: A ruthless duelist who relies on machines.

11.name: Shadi
11.title: Millennium Guardian
11.flavor: A mysterious guardian of the Millennium Items.

12.name: Yami Bakura
12.title: Dark Spirit
12.flavor: The dark spirit within the Millennium Ring.

13.name: Pegasus
13.title: Creator of Duel Monsters
13.flavor: The creator of the card game with the Millennium Eye.

14.name: Isis
14.title: Priestess of Light
14.flavor: An ancient priestess who serves the Pharaoh.

15.name: Kaiba
15.title: Dragon Master
15.flavor: A powerful duelist who commands the Blue-Eyes White Dragon.

18.name: Mage Soldier
18.title: Dark Army
18.flavor: A soldier in Heishin's dark army.

20.name: High Mage Secmeton
20.title: Arcane Master
20.flavor: A powerful mage serving under Heishin.

25.name: Seto
25.title: High Priest
25.flavor: The ambitious High Priest of the Pharaoh's court.

26.name: Heishin
26.title: Dark Sorcerer
26.flavor: A dark sorcerer seeking the Millennium Items.

29.name: DarkNite
29.title: Shadow Entity
29.flavor: A being of pure darkness summoned by Heishin.

30.name: Nitemare
30.title: Ultimate Darkness
30.flavor: The final embodiment of shadow and chaos.
